purpose: Define internal Day30, Day60, and Day100 operating thresholds for B2B Alpha Feed viability without implementing analytics, payment, customer access, runtime delivery, or external integrations.
required_language: Pivot gates are internal operating thresholds, not guarantees, investment signals, financial advice, ranking promises, funding promises, or customer acquisition promises.

allowed_metric_sources: existing report views if already available
existing geo-checker runs if already available
existing valid submissions if already available
existing claim attempts if already available
buyer-interest shell interactions only if no-write and measured by existing safe logs
manual feedback counts if documented without private details
data buyer replies if manually documented and non-private

checkpoints.name: Day30 signal sanity check
continue_if: zero P0/P1 privacy, payment, runtime, or restricted-copy incidents
at least two safe signal categories are available or manually documented
no evidence source requires PII collection, payment, live feed delivery, external service, or Supabase write
pause_if: only one safe signal category is available
review evidence is too sparse for interpretation
non-blocking P2/P3 sidecar issues need cleanup before wider readiness review
pivot_if: manual feedback shows the current framing is unclear
safe evidence favors another audience, report bundle, or public-signal packaging
kill_if: P0/P1 privacy, payment, runtime, restricted-copy, or data-mutation issue is confirmed
the concept cannot be evaluated without PII collection, payment, live delivery, external services, or unsafe claims

checkpoints.name: Day60 viability review
continue_if: three or more safe signal categories are available or manually documented
evidence supports a bounded OPS8A readiness scan without enabling runtime delivery
pause_if: key evidence depends on manual review that has not been completed
non-runtime docs or checker maintenance should land before production-readiness planning
pivot_if: safe evidence points to a narrower report, QA pack, or waitlist-style evidence loop
buyer-interest language needs repositioning away from access or commercial entitlement
kill_if: continued evaluation would require unsafe collection, payment coupling, live feed delivery, or external service dependency

checkpoints.name: Day100 phase decision
continue_if: zero P0/P1 incidents across the observation window
safe evidence supports internal beta readiness planning
OPS8A can define release-candidate prerequisites without starting PR101
pause_if: readiness evidence is incomplete but still safe to gather manually
gate-maintenance debt should be resolved before any release-candidate scan
pivot_if: evidence supports a docs/report product but not a feed delivery surface
audience or packaging needs to shift before internal beta planning
kill_if: the Alpha Feed concept depends on private data, unsafe commercial claims, live delivery, payment, or external services to be credible

review.codex_role: prepare evidence and readiness summary only
review.pr100_consumption: PR100 should verify this contract exists, confirm it is docs/ops-only, and summarize how the gate informs B2B Alpha readiness.
review.ops8a_consumption: OPS8A should use this gate as an input to release-candidate and internal beta readiness scanning, without treating it as launch approval.
